LanguageData.Ammo_4mmRailgun_Ion.label: 4mm Railgun cartridge (Discharge)
LanguageData.Ammo_4mmRailgun_Ion.description: Fin-stabilized tungsten carbide penetrator with discarding sabot, designed for railgun rifles. Features an ionized particle payload.
LanguageData.Ammo_6mmRailgun_Ion.label: 6mm Railgun cartridge (Discharge)
LanguageData.Ammo_6mmRailgun_Ion.description: Fin-stabilized tungsten carbide penetrator with discarding sabot, designed for railgun rifles. Features an ionized particle payload.
LanguageData.Ammo_8mmRailgun_Ion.label: 8mm Railgun cartridge (Discharge)
LanguageData.Ammo_8mmRailgun_Ion.description: Fin-stabilized tungsten carbide penetrator with discarding sabot, designed for railgun rifles. Features an ionized particle payload.
LanguageData.Ammo_12mmRailgun_Ion.label: 12mm Railgun cartridge (Discharge)
LanguageData.Ammo_12mmRailgun_Ion.description: Fin-stabilized tungsten carbide penetrator with discarding sabot, designed for railgun rifles. Features an ionized particle payload.
LanguageData.Bullet_4mmRailgun_Ion.label: 4mm Railgun bullet (Discharge)
LanguageData.Bullet_6mmRailgun_Ion.label: 6mm Railgun bullet (Discharge)
LanguageData.Bullet_8mmRailgun_Ion.label: 8mm Railgun bullet (Discharge)
LanguageData.Bullet_12mmRailgun_Ion_Lance.label: 12mm Railgun bullet (Discharge)
LanguageData.Bullet_12mmRailgun_Ion_Blast.label: Ion Blast
